name: devguardian-ai
description: DevGuardian AI - an AI Engineering Brain for software teams.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
